questionHtml: Athletes taking growth hormones show an increase in their sprinting capacity. This is not maintained after discontinuing the drug. Suggest one reason for the disappearance of the effect.
markschemeHtml:
growth hormone/drug no longer present «in blood» OWTTE
OR
lack of hormones reduce «gained» muscle mass/strength ✔
